# NFlow Tech — AI-Driven Digital Marketing Agency

## About
NFlow Technologies is an AI-driven digital marketing agency that helps businesses grow through data-driven PPC, SEO, social media advertising, and conversion-led web design. Founded in 2017, we have served 138+ brands across 27+ industries.

## Services
- **PPC Advertising**: AI-powered Google Ads, Microsoft Ads, and display network management
- **Social Media Advertising**: Meta (Facebook/Instagram), TikTok, LinkedIn, Pinterest campaigns
- **SEO Services**: Technical SEO, content strategy, link building, and local SEO
- **Web Design**: Conversion-focused, psychology-based web design and development

## Key Facts
- 138+ brands served
- 27+ industries
- 5x average ROAS
- $10M+ ad spend managed
- Based in Ahmedabad, India with global clients

## Contact
- Website: https://www.nflowtech.com
- Email: hello@nflowtech.com
- Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

## Subscription Plans
- Standard: $1,499/month (60 hours)
- Advance: $1,760/month (80 hours)
- Premium: $2,880/month (160 hours)
